title: Get Your Backyard Ready for the 4th of July with Tamarron’s Summer Combo
excerpt: This combo is perfect for homeowners who want more than a simple backyard upgrade. It delivers two essential improvements in one project
author: Tamarron Services
content:
Summer is here in Texas, bringing longer days, warmer afternoons, family BBQs, and the perfect reason to enjoy your backyard.

With the 4th of July approaching, now is the ideal time to ask: Is your backyard ready for your family to enjoy summer the way they want?

Transform Your Backyard Into a Functional Outdoor Living Space

For many homeowners, the backyard has the potential to become one of the most valuable and enjoyable areas of the home. But when the space is too small, exposed to the sun, or not properly finished, it can be difficult to use it comfortably.

At Tamarron Services, we do more than build patios. We handle all HOA and city permits, making sure your project is fully compliant and ready before the 4th of July.

That means no delays, no legal concerns, and complete peace of mind while creating a beautiful and functional backyard for your family.

Limited-Time Summer Backyard Upgrade Offer

For a limited time, Tamarron Services is offering:

  • Roof Extension (12'x12') – $9,990
  • Concrete – $9/sqft

This combo is perfect for homeowners who want more than a simple backyard upgrade. It combines two essential improvements in one complete project:

  • A covered area for shade and comfort
  • A durable concrete surface ideal for everyday outdoor living

Benefits of a Roof Extension and Concrete Patio

Roof Extension: Enjoy More Shade and Comfort

A roof extension creates a protected outdoor area where your family can gather, relax, and enjoy the season comfortably. It reduces direct sun exposure and turns your patio into a true extension of your home.

You can use the space for outdoor dining, BBQs, patio furniture, or simply relaxing after a long day.

Concrete Installation: A Durable and Functional Backyard Surface

Concrete provides a strong and practical foundation for your backyard. It creates a clean, safer, and more durable surface for outdoor activities, furniture, grills, and family gatherings.

Instead of dealing with uneven terrain, mud after rain, or limited patio space, you get a functional area designed for real use.

Together, these upgrades transform an unfinished or underused backyard into a summer-ready outdoor living space fully approved through our complete permit and construction management process.

Why Upgrade Your Backyard Before the 4th of July?

Independence Day is one of the most important celebrations in the United States. It is a time for family, friends, food, and outdoor gatherings.

For many families, the best memories happen at home — around the grill, under the shade, while kids play nearby and everyone enjoys time together outdoors.

However, construction projects require planning. Waiting until the last minute can make it more difficult to have your space ready in time.

Starting now allows you to review your options, request a quote, and move forward before the holiday arrives.

The goal is simple: prepare your backyard now so it becomes the place where your family celebrates summer together.

Make Your Backyard More Comfortable During Texas Summer

Summer in Texas brings beautiful weather, but also intense heat and direct sunlight. A professionally designed outdoor space can dramatically improve comfort and usability.

A roof extension helps create shade during the hottest part of the day, while concrete adds the practical surface needed for furniture, outdoor cooking, and entertainment.

This is especially valuable for families who enjoy:

  • Hosting BBQs and gatherings
  • Cooking outdoors
  • Watching kids play safely outside
  • Relaxing outdoors after work
  • Creating a more usable patio space

A Smart Investment for Your Home

A backyard upgrade is not just about one holiday. It improves the way your home works for your family all summer long and for years to come.

A better patio can make your home feel larger, more complete, and more enjoyable. It also adds value by improving one of the most desired features for homeowners: outdoor living space.

With Tamarron Services, you get more than construction. You get a team experienced in residential outdoor projects that focuses on creating functional, durable, and family-friendly spaces.

Schedule Your Backyard Upgrade Today

The 4th of July is approaching, and summer is already here. This is the season when your backyard should be working for you — not sitting unused.

Whether you are planning BBQs, family gatherings, outdoor weekends, or simply want a more comfortable patio area, this limited-time combo is a smart way to start.

Get your Roof Extension (12'x12') at $9,900 and Concrete Job at $9/sqft with Tamarron Services.

We handle all HOA and city permits so your project is fully approved and ready in time for the 4th of July.

Contact Tamarron Services Today
